case_title: ALLAN REYES VS. MELVIN HUGO PRITCHARD

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-28-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-28-2016 BY DANIEL WEINGARTEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ALLAN REYES. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MELVIN HUGO PRITCHARD. PARTIES STIPULATE TO HEARING BEFORE JPT. REQUEST TO CORRECT DEFENDANT'S NAME ON COURT RECORDS FROM MELVIN HUGO TO MELVIN HUGO PRITCHARD - GRANTED. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DANIEL WEINGARTEN. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF REYES, ALLAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2016 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-03-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PRITCHARD, MELVIN HUGO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REYES, ALLAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRITCHARD, MELVIN HUGO $770.23 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $865.23, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
